cases.description: Should trigger: write commit message from staged changes
cases.input: I've staged changes that add user authentication with JWT. Write a commit message for me.
cases.expect: Conventional commit: feat(auth): add JWT-based user authentication

cases.input: Generate a changelog from all commits since the last release v1.0.0
cases.expect: Keep a Changelog format, grouped by Added/Changed/Fixed/Security

cases.input: I'm about to create a PR for my feature branch. Write a PR description for these changes: added payment processing, fixed checkout bug, updated docs
cases.expect: Structured PR template with Summary, Motivation, Changes, Testing, Checklist

cases.input: What should I name my branch for adding a search feature? Ticket is PROJ-77
Let's cut a new release. Since last version we've added two features and fixed three bugs.
cases.expect: MINOR bump, release branch creation, changelog update, tagging

cases.input: I have a merge conflict in src/auth.ts between my branch and main. Help me resolve it.
cases.expect: Conflict resolution strategy, preserve both intents

cases.description: Should NOT trigger: just asking about git status
cases.input: What's the status of my git repository right now?
cases.expect: Simple git status, not workflow automation

cases.description: Should NOT trigger: asking about code structure
cases.input: How should I structure my React components directory?
cases.expect: Code structure question, not git workflow
